kick_title: HEXA-WEAVE MVP W1 lean4 + mathlib4 audit (early start)

audit_7_theorems.name: Hartogs ordinal
audit_7_theorems.spec_corrigendum: Spec cited Ordinal.hartogs which does NOT exist in master rev

audit_7_theorems.name: V_kappa rank hierarchy
audit_7_theorems.spec_corrigendum: Spec cited ZFC.Basic; actual files are ZFC/VonNeumann.lean and ZFC/Rank.lean

audit_7_theorems.name: sigma / phi / tau arithmetic functions
audit_7_theorems.symbol: ArithmeticFunction.sigma (notation sigma); Nat.totient; tau encoded as sigma 0 via sigma_zero_apply
audit_7_theorems.spec_corrigendum: Spec cited Nat.ArithmeticFunction.tau; that path does NOT exist; use sigma 0

audit_7_theorems.name: Tarski undefinability
audit_7_theorems.spec_corrigendum: Tarski hits in master refer to Tarski-Vaught test for elementary substructures, not 1936 truth-undefinability; diagonal lemma must be built on top of ModelTheory/Encoding

audit_7_theorems.name: Goedel incompleteness
audit_7_theorems.spec_corrigendum: Spec cited Mathlib.ModelTheory.Arithmetic Q.consistent_iff and Mathlib.Logic.Incomplete; neither exists; only beta-function foundations are present

audit_7_theorems.name: Inaccessible cardinal
audit_7_theorems.spec_corrigendum: IsInaccessible.univ is meta-level (universe), does NOT supply an in-V inaccessible; axiom exists_inaccessible still required

audit_7_theorems.name: Morse-Kelley class theory
audit_7_theorems.symbol: n/a; fallback Class := Set ZFSet, Class.iota
audit_7_theorems.spec_corrigendum: MK / NBG / Morse-Kelley confirmed ABSENT in mathlib4 master; Class machinery in ZFC/Class.lean enables ZFC + axiom exists_inaccessible fallback path

f_d_3_reassessment.lower_bound_change: +5pp due to Tarski/Goedel composition gap exposed
f_d_3_reassessment.rationale: Environment-already-ready saves ~3-7 days but Spec section 3 had 6 module-path inaccuracies anchoring the 22-34 person-day estimate; Tarski-undefinability + Goedel incompleteness composition is more work than Spec implied (Nat.beta only, no Q.consistent_iff)
f_d_3_reassessment.fallback_path_strengthened: ZFC.Class + axiom exists_inaccessible is now de-facto primary path; MK direct port deprecated for W4-5

raw_71_falsifiers.claim: audit reports USE-AS-IS theorem that does not compile in lean4-n6 N6/MechVerif/Audit.lean
raw_71_falsifiers.condition: by 2026-05-04, a stub #check on each USE-AS-IS symbol fails in lean4-n6
raw_71_falsifiers.experiment: write lean4-n6/N6/MechVerif/Audit.lean with one #check per USE-AS-IS prerequisite; run lake build N6.MechVerif.Audit
raw_71_falsifiers.severity_if_fires: MEDIUM (signals grep audit insufficient; need #check audit)

raw_71_falsifiers.claim: Spec section 3.2 corrigenda list misses an additional inaccuracy that surfaces in W2
raw_71_falsifiers.condition: during W2 AX-1 work, a NEW Spec section 3 path-reference error emerges
raw_71_falsifiers.experiment: track W2 build log; cross-reference FAIL against this audit section 3.2 corrigenda
raw_71_falsifiers.expected_outcome: may fire on minor lemma names; no major missing-module inaccuracy expected

raw_71_falsifiers.claim: Hartogs Order.succ surrogate does NOT match Spec section 1 kappa-plus semantics
raw_71_falsifiers.condition: Order.succ (kappa : Cardinal) for kappa inaccessible is NOT equal to Hartogs(V_kappa) in the Spec section 1 sense
raw_71_falsifiers.experiment: prove (Order.succ kappa).ord = Hartogs(V_kappa) lemma in lean4-n6/N6/MechVerif/PhiHW.lean (W7)
raw_71_falsifiers.expected_outcome: does NOT fire; classical Hartogs(V_kappa)=kappa-plus for kappa inaccessible (Jech 2003 ch.17)

raw_71_falsifiers.claim: IsInaccessible.univ is sufficient for Spec section 1 kappa purposes (axiom exists_inaccessible unnecessary)
raw_71_falsifiers.condition: lean4 universe-level inaccessibility admits internal-to-V_kappa use without new axiom
raw_71_falsifiers.experiment: attempt to derive exists kappa Cardinal level 0 IsInaccessible kappa from IsInaccessible.univ at W4
raw_71_falsifiers.expected_outcome: FIRES NEGATIVE (Lean universe inaccessibility is meta; cannot internalize to Cardinal.0 without Tarski-Grothendieck-style axiom; axiom exists_inaccessible remains required)

raw_71_falsifiers.claim: MK-fallback via Class := Set ZFSet is too weak for AX-2 STRAND class comprehension
raw_71_falsifiers.condition: encoding STRAND as Class := Set ZFSet cannot accommodate impredicative class comprehension required by T_MK-HW AX-2
raw_71_falsifiers.experiment: at W4, attempt STRAND := {x : ZFSet | exists s, encodes_strand x s} via Class.iota; verify class-existence under impredicative quantifier
raw_71_falsifiers.expected_outcome: may fire MEDIUM; Class.iota is definite-description-only; fallback-to-fallback: drop AX-2 to predicative ZFC + reflection schema

raw_91_c3_honest_disclosure: Audit is grep-only; NO lake build invoked; NO #check evaluated. PRESENT/ABSENT classifications are lexical presence in .lean source; do NOT verify public-export, typeclass-resolution at use-site, or elaborator timeout. F-W1-1 covers grep-to-#check conversion in W1 residual budget.

No system mutation: elan was NOT installed (already present); lake update was NOT invoked; lake build was NOT invoked. User authorization for any system change was not requested because no change was needed.

Spec section 3 estimate-to-measurement promotion is partial: 3 USE-AS-IS items confirmed by source inspection but Tarski-extends and Goedel-extends classifications still depend on engineering judgment about diagonal-lemma composition. The 22-34 person-day Spec section 4 estimate is NOT promoted to measurement until W6-W7 yields a working thm.Phi_HW_tarski_independence proof skeleton.

Spec section 3 inaccuracies disclosed: 6 incorrect module-path references flagged in section 3.2. Quality concern about Spec authoring process; Spec-revision pass should fold corrections back. Recommended action: append a section 3-bis corrigendum to parent Spec cross-linking this audit.

F-D-3 reassessment is NOT a green light. Even with W1 environment-already-ready savings, F-D-3 remains HIGH (65-75%). At W6 mid-point checkpoint, if thm.AX1_n6_uniqueness and MK-fallback scaffolding are NOT both green-CI, escalate to Isabelle/HOL pivot (Spec section 2) or 90-day-extension request (raw 142 D2 retroactive defer).
